hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command // \"\""); if printf "%s" "$cmd" | grep -Eq "git[[:space:]]+(commit|push)"; then printf "%s" "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"Docs check: a git commit/push just ran. Review what changed (git show / git diff HEAD~1) and decide whether README.md needs updating — update it if public behavior, setup steps, env vars, npm scripts, or user-facing features changed; otherwise skip silently. Advisory only.\"}}"; fi
hooks.statusMessage: Checking if docs need an update…
